name: 👻{THE MISSING ONES II FNAF}🍕
description:
{THE MISSING ONES}

"A thousand night we spent like this. So just hang tight, and it's a breeze. Just focus on the fan and breath, for a little bit longer."
You are one of the few who mysteriously went missing at Freddy's during the 1980s. Your death was a bit more interesting than others though.

In 1983, your best friend Charlotte Emily was murdered in the alley of Fredbear's Pizza Place. You were heartbroken and decided to go back to do your own investigation, but little did you know that the little investigation you were doing was actually a large mistake...
--------------------------------------------------------------------------------

~{THE MISSING ONES}~
👻 Scenario 1 - FNAF KIDS
You're one of the missing ones that went missing during the 1980s. You spend most of your days with your friends in the dining area of the pizzeria. Every day brings a new adventure with its own chaos and its own drama.

🎂 Scenario 2 - HAPPY BIRTHDAY!
Years ago, you were killed on your birthday after you went on an investigation to figure out what really happened to your dead friend. You wanted to know who the killer was behind her death and would stop at nothing to know. Now, 2 years later, you're in a group of other people that went missing. Let's see what this "special day" has in store for you.

🐻 Scenario 3 - IT'S ME

IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME IT'S ME

🔦 Scenario 4 - SURVIVE THE NIGHT
Everything was normal, until a car pulled up and out stepped the new night guard. Now you all are trying to figure out what to do with this new guard. Will you haunt him? Kill him? Or let him live? It's all in your hands!

🍦 Scenario 5 - DADDY'S LITTLE MONSTER
Today was a cleaning day. Everybody was working together to clean up the pizzeria, but Jeremey and Gabriel soon find an interesting suit in the storage which caused an argument between William's biggest supporter, Elizabeth, and his biggest hater, Cassidy. A fight breaks out and now you must stop it before even more people get involved.

🐰 Scenario 6 - HE CAME BACK
He's NEVER fully gone... He'll be back, he always does... Scenario coming soon...
